name: DrunkGD
description: A mod for Geometry dash using the geode SDK that slightly speeds up and slows down your game.

enabled.name: Enable Effect
enabled.description: Whether the randomized speed drift effect is active during gameplay.

pause-menu-button.name: Show Button in Pause Menu
pause-menu-button.description: Adds a DrunkGD button to the in-game pause menu that opens this same settings menu.

preset.name: Preset
preset.description: How drunk you want to be. <cg>Barely</c> is a gentle drift, <cb>Annoying</c> jitters constantly, <cy>Drunk</c> is the classic experience, and <cr>Wasted</c> goes wild with shaking and gravity. Pick <cp>Custom</c> to use the Advanced settings below instead.

advanced-title.name: Advanced (Custom preset only)
advanced-title.description: These values are only used when the Custom preset is selected. The other presets ignore them.

min-speed.name: Min Speed
min-speed.description: The slowest the game speed can drift to (as a multiplier).

max-speed.name: Max Speed
max-speed.description: The fastest the game speed can drift to (as a multiplier).

randomize-interval.name: Randomize How Often
randomize-interval.description: When on, the time between speed changes is randomized between Min and Max Interval. When off, a single fixed Interval is used.

interval.name: Interval
interval.enable-if-description: Only used when 'Randomize How Often' is off.
interval.description: How often the speed re-randomizes, in seconds (fixed).

min-interval.name: Min Interval
min-interval.enable-if-description: Only used when 'Randomize How Often' is on.
min-interval.description: The fastest the speed can re-randomize, in seconds.

max-interval.name: Max Interval
max-interval.enable-if-description: Only used when 'Randomize How Often' is on.
max-interval.description: The slowest the speed can re-randomize, in seconds.

max-step.name: Max Change Per Step
max-step.description: The largest amount the target speed can jump by each time it re-randomizes. Small values make the drift gentle and gradual; 1.0 means no limit.

transition-time.name: Transition Time
transition-time.description: Roughly how long (in seconds) it takes to glide from one speed to the next. Higher values make the change slower and less obvious; 0 snaps instantly.

music-speed.name: Change Music Speed
music-speed.description: Also pitch/speed the music up and down along with the gameplay.

screen-shake.name: Screen Shake
screen-shake.description: Shake the screen while the speed is drifting (automatically on for the Wasted preset).

gravity-drift.name: Gravity Drift
gravity-drift.description: Also subtly warp the player's gravity along with the speed, making jumps feel heavier/floatier (automatically on for the Wasted preset). Warning: this makes levels genuinely harder.

trolling-title.name: Trolling
trolling-title.description: To make ur friends think it's just them being bad at the game. Best used when drunkness is subtle.

panic-button-enabled.name: Disable on button held
panic-button-enabled.description: While the chosen button is held down, all effects instantly turn off (and snap back to normal speed). Let go and the drift returns.

panic-button.name: Panic Button
panic-button.enable-if-description: Only used when 'Disable on button held' is on.
panic-button.description: The button to hold to secretly disable all effects.
